S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad a mahofoc ci Margrethe II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Denmark anini i ci Margrethe II, patirengan i 1972 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Kahofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ nikalahongtian ÁĻľśČŅÁéčšĹć lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂

S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad a mahofoc ci Margrethe II, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Denmark anini i ci Margrethe II, patirengan i 1972 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 14 a romi'ad. Kahofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ nikalahongtian ÁĻľśČŅÁéčšĹć lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂
